verdict_reason: Both prior items verified resolved in the delta (count corrected to 6; gateway dev-run wiring now real in dev.compose.yml and the Dockerfile); only one new Minor doc gap about how to restart the gateway in --dev mode.

todos.issue: New gateway --dev bullet says source changes are 'picked up on restart like the backend', but the doc's only documented restart mechanism (bounce-backend.sh, lines 20/46/50) is hard-coded to trade-imports-animals-backend — there is no scripted or documented way to restart the gateway container
todos.fix: Either document the gateway restart command (or extend bounce-backend.sh to take a service arg / add bounce-gateway.sh) and reference it from the gateway bullet and the 'Pick up edited Java source' rows
